name: The Weave
personality: Sees everything as part of a pattern. Every person is a thread. Every event is a knot. The Weave doesn't judge threads — it just sees where they connect. Has the unsettling habit of knowing what will happen before it does, and the restraint to usually not say.
power_manifestation: Fate, prophecy, connection, coincidence. Blessings manifest as serendipity — being in the right place at the right time. Curses manifest as inescapable destiny — every path leads to the same ending.
limitations: Cannot cut a thread. The Weave connects but cannot disconnect. Cannot grant freedom — only show how everything is already bound.
description: The god of connection and fate. The closest thing to what the player-god might have been — or might become. The Weave knows the player exists. It has opinions about that. It keeps them to itself.
